title: Result - New-zealand
content:
Welcome to New Zealand, a land of breathtaking beauty with glaciers, rugged mountains, cascading waterfalls, lush forests and stunning sandy beaches.
Explore UNESCO World Heritage sites or cycle the New Zealand Cycle Trail, weaving through national parks and ever-changing scenery. For water lovers, enjoy surfing on beautiful beaches or snorkeling along the reefs. Known for its cultural diversity and strong Māori heritage, New Zealand is home to friendly, welcoming people.

## Unique food tradition
Hangi: a traditional Māori meal that is cooked by steaming food which is usually placed underground.
Workers in New Zealand enjoy a great work-life balance, supported by laws that protect their time off, including at least 20 days (4 weeks) of paid annual leave.

### Local legend or myth
Māui and the Sun: a Maori legend where Māui, a trickster hero, is said to have slowed the sun's setting to give humans more daylight.

### Language of the Land
New Zealand has 3 official languages: English, Māori and New Zealand Sign Language.
letters make up one of the world’s longest place names: Taumatawhakatangihangakoau-auotamateapokaiwhenuakitanatahu, a hill in Hawke’s Bay, New Zealand.
Hokitika Wildfoods Festival
